welcome_text.en: 🚀 Welcome to the trading bot A unique tool for working with an algorithmic strategy on the cryptocurrency market 📊 🔐 Secure fund storage ⚡ Fast deposits and withdrawals 📱 Simple and intuitive interface 📈 The bot automatically executes trades based on the strategy No complexity No manual setup 💰 Get started and leverage algorithmic trading 🚀 Everything is ready — you can begin
